---
title: "Current Research"
---
<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

## I am broadly interested in understanding how forest species will respond to future climate change. I am particularly interested in the potential for species and populations to undergo rapid local adaptation, a long neglected pillar of plant response to change. 

[evidence of that rapid adaptation can occur and has occurred in the past to enable species survival to past climate shifts]


Mortality


Plasticity


Local Adaptation 



Synthesis
